description.en: Developed GxP-compliant EWM solution for pharmaceutical industry. Batch management and serialization integration completed.
description.tr: İlaç sektörüne özel GxP uyumlu EWM çözümü geliştirildi. Batch management ve serialization entegrasyonu yapıldı.
description.lv: Izstrādāts GxP atbilstošs EWM risinājums farmācijas nozarei. Pabeigta sērijas pārvaldības un serializācijas integrācija.
description.de: GxP-konformes EWM-Lösungskonzept für die Pharmaindustrie entwickelt. Chargenverwaltung und Serialisierungsintegration abgeschlossen.

description.en: SAP EWM integration for omni-channel retail distribution center. Centralized management of e-commerce and store orders.
description.tr: Çok kanallı perakende dağıtım merkezine SAP EWM entegrasyonu. E-ticaret ve mağaza siparişlerinin tek merkezden yönetimi.
description.lv: SAP EWM integrācija daudzkanālu mazumtirdzniecības izplatīšanas centram. Centralizēta e-komercijas un veikala pasūtījumu pārvaldība.
description.de: SAP EWM-Integration für ein Omnichannel-Einzelhandels-Distributionszentrum. Zentralisierte Verwaltung von E-Commerce- und Filialbestellungen.

description.en: ABAP development and optimization for manufacturing warehouse management. Custom PPF action and BADI implementations.
description.tr: Üretim tesisi depo yönetimi için ABAP geliştirme ve optimizasyon. Custom PPF action ve BADI implementasyonları.
description.lv: ABAP izstrāde un optimizācija ražošanas noliktavas pārvaldībai. Pielāgota PPF darbību un BADI ieviešana.
description.de: ABAP-Entwicklung und -Optimierung für das Fertigungslager. Implementierung benutzerdefinierter PPF-Aktionen und BADIs.

description.en: Multi-client EWM solution for 3PL operations. Billing integration and custom reporting.
description.tr: 3PL operasyonları için çok müşterili EWM çözümü. Faturalama entegrasyonu ve custom raporlama.
description.lv: Vairāku klientu EWM risinājums 3PL operācijām. Norēķinu integrācija un pielāgota atskaišu veidošana.
description.de: EWM-Mehrmandantenlösung für 3PL-Betriebe. Abrechnungsintegration und benutzerdefiniertes Reporting.

description.en: Successful WM to EWM migration for distribution center. S/4HANA embedded EWM transition.
description.tr: Dağıtım merkezi WM'den EWM'ye başarılı migrasyon. S/4HANA embedded EWM geçişi.
description.lv: Veiksmīga WM uz EWM migrācija izplatīšanas centram. S/4HANA iegultā EWM pāreja.
description.de: Erfolgreiche WM-zu-EWM-Migration für ein Distributionszentrum. Übergang zu S/4HANA Embedded EWM.
